final:
module bluetooth_state_machine (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input start,
    input disconnect,
    input connecting_done,
    output reg [1:0] state // 00: IDLE, 01: CONNECTING, 10: CONNECTED
);

    // State encoding
    parameter IDLE = 2'b00;
    parameter CONNECTING = 2'b01;
    parameter CONNECTED = 2'b10;

    // State transition logic
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state <= IDLE;
        end else begin
            case (state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if (start) begin
                        state <= CONNECTING;
                    end
                end
                CONNECTING: begin
                    if (connecting_done) begin
                        state <= CONNECTED;
                    end else if (disconnect) begin
                        state <= IDLE;
                    end
                end
                CONNECTED: begin
                    if (disconnect) begin
                        state <= IDLE;
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (1'b1) begin
        state <= IDLE;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
